wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Faworra project overview section. Explain the platform's purpose as an AI-powered business automation solution for financial operations including invoicing, time tracking, banking reconciliation, document processing, and intelligent insights. Document the key value propositions, target audience, and core business benefits. Describe the multi-platform architecture supporting web dashboard, desktop application, and API integration. Include the technology stack overview covering TypeScript, Next.js, Hono, Tauri, and AI/ML components. Provide high-level feature descriptions and use case scenarios. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and make content accessible to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive system design documentation for Faworra's architecture. Document the layered architecture pattern showing presentation, business logic, and data access layers. Describe the microservices approach with independent deployable units and their responsibilities. Include system boundaries, external dependencies, and integration points with cloud services (Supabase, Stripe, Sentry). Address scalability considerations, load balancing strategies, and fault tolerance mechanisms. Document the technology stack choices and their impact on system design decisions.

Explain the internationalization system, theme management, and responsive design patterns. Detail the component library usage, state management with Zustand stores, and real-time features implementation. Include routing strategies, middleware configuration, and SEO optimization. Document the build process, deployment configuration, and performance optimization techniques. Address development workflow, hot reloading setup, and debugging approaches specific to the dashboard application.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# Faworra Project Overview

## 1. Project Introduction

Faworra (formerly Midday) is an AI-powered business automation platform designed to streamline financial operations for businesses. The platform provides comprehensive solutions including invoicing, time tracking, financial reconciliation, document processing, and intelligent insights generation.

### Purpose Statement
The project aims to automate repetitive financial tasks, provide real-time financial visibility, and offer intelligent business insights through AI-driven automation and modern web technologies.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Financial Automation**: Automate invoicing, expense tracking, and financial reconciliation processes
- **AI Integration**: Leverage AI tools for document processing, categorization, and insights generation
- **Multi-Platform Support**: Provide web, desktop, and API-first architecture
- **Real-time Intelligence**: Deliver actionable business insights and financial analytics
- **Developer Experience**: Offer robust APIs and developer-friendly integrations

### Target Audience
- Small to medium-sized businesses seeking financial automation
- Accountants and bookkeepers looking for intelligent workflow assistance
- Developers building financial applications or integrations
- Teams requiring comprehensive financial management solutions

## 2. Technical Architecture

The Faworra project follows a modern monorepo architecture with clear separation of concerns across multiple applications and shared packages.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Web Dashboard] --> B[API Gateway]
    C[Desktop App] --> B
    D[Worker Services] --> B
    E[Website] --> B
    
    B --> F[API Application]
    F --> G[PostgreSQL Database]
    F --> H[Redis Cache]
    
    F --> I[Shared Packages]
    I --> J[Accounting]
    I --> K[Banking]
    I --> L[Documents]
    I --> M[Invoices]
    I --> N[Utilities]
    
    O[AI/ML Layer] --> F
    P[External Services] --> F
```

### Component Breakdown

**Core Applications:**
- **Dashboard**: Next.js-based web application with React frontend
- **API**: Hono-based backend service with tRPC integration
- **Desktop**: Tauri-based cross-platform desktop application
- **Worker**: Background job processing service using BullMQ
- **Website**: Marketing and informational site

**Shared Package Architecture:**
- Modular packages for domain-specific functionality
- Consistent TypeScript configuration across all packages
- Workspace-based dependency management

### Design Patterns

**Monorepo Pattern**: Centralized codebase with multiple applications sharing common packages
**API-First Design**: REST and GraphQL APIs with comprehensive documentation
**Event-Driven Architecture**: Background jobs and event processing
**Layered Architecture**: Clear separation between presentation, business logic, and data access layers

## 3. Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points

**API Application Entry Point**
- Location: `apps/api/src/index.ts`
- Framework: Hono with OpenAPI documentation
- Authentication: Bearer tokens and internal API keys
- Monitoring: Sentry integration and health checks

**Dashboard Application Entry Point**
- Location: `apps/dashboard/src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx`
- Framework: Next.js 16 with App Router
- State Management: Zustand and React Query
- Internationalization: Next International

**Desktop Application Entry Point**
- Location: `apps/desktop/src/main.tsx`
- Framework: Tauri with React frontend
- Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux support

### Core Modules

**tRPC Implementation**
- Location: `apps/api/src/trpc/init.ts`
- Context creation with authentication and database access
- Middleware for performance monitoring and team permissions
- Support for public, protected, and internal procedures

**Database Layer**
- Location: `packages/db/package.json`
- Drizzle ORM integration with PostgreSQL
- Shared database client across applications
- Migration and schema management

**AI/ML Integration**
- Location: `apps/api/src/ai/` and `apps/api/src/mcp/`
- Agent-based architecture for task execution
- Tool integration for external service communication
- Artifact management for AI-generated content

### Configuration Approach

**Turbo Repository Configuration**
- Location: `turbo.json`
- Task orchestration and caching strategies
- Environment variable management
- Build pipeline optimization

**Workspace Dependencies**
- All packages use workspace:* for internal dependencies
- Consistent version management across shared packages
- Package exports for clean API surface

### External Dependencies

**Core Technology Stack:**
- **Runtime**: Bun for fast JavaScript execution
- **Framework**: Next.js 16, Hono, Tauri
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
- **Caching**: Redis for session and cache management
- **Background Jobs**: BullMQ with Redis backend
- **Monitoring**: Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring

**AI/ML Services:**
- OpenAI and Anthropic for language model interactions
- Custom agent framework for complex workflows
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) for standardized AI tooling

### Integration Points

**Authentication & Authorization**
- Supabase for user authentication and session management
- OAuth integration for third-party services
- Team-based permission system

**Payment Processing**
- Stripe integration for subscription management
- Automated payment handling and reconciliation

**Document Processing**
- PDF generation and manipulation
- Cloud storage integration for document management
- OCR capabilities for document analysis

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant Dashboard
    participant API
    participant Database
    participant AI_Service
    
    Client->>Dashboard: User Action
    Dashboard->>API: tRPC Request
    API->>Database: Query/Update Data
    Database-->>API: Response
    API->>AI_Service: AI Processing Request
    AI_Service-->>API: AI Response
    API-->>Dashboard: Processed Data
    Dashboard-->>Client: Updated Interface
```

## 4. Key Features

### Functionality Overview

**Financial Management**
- Comprehensive invoicing system with templates and automation
- Bank account reconciliation with automatic categorization
- Expense tracking and receipt processing
- Financial reporting and analytics

**Time Tracking & Project Management**
- Integrated time tracking with project allocation
- Billable hours calculation and invoicing
- Team collaboration features
- Resource utilization analytics

**Document Management**
- Multi-format document upload and processing
- Intelligent document categorization
- Secure storage with encryption
- Version control and audit trails

**AI-Powered Insights**
- Automated financial pattern recognition
- Predictive analytics for cash flow forecasting
- Expense anomaly detection
- Performance benchmarking

### Implementation Highlights

**Modular Package Architecture**
- `packages/accounting/`, `packages/banking/`, `packages/invoice/`
- Reusable components across applications
- Consistent data models and validation

**Advanced Search & Filtering**
- Location: `apps/api/src/schemas/search.ts`
- Real-time search across all data types
- Advanced filtering with faceted navigation

**Real-time Collaboration**
- WebSocket integration for live updates
- Conflict resolution for concurrent edits
- Audit trails for all changes

### Feature Architecture

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> UserAuthentication
    UserAuthentication --> DashboardLoading
    DashboardLoading --> FeatureSelection
    
    FeatureSelection --> Invoicing: Select Invoice
    FeatureSelection --> Banking: Select Bank
    FeatureSelection --> Documents: Select Documents
    FeatureSelection --> TimeTracking: Select Tracker
    
    Invoicing --> InvoiceCreation
    InvoiceCreation --> InvoiceProcessing
    InvoiceProcessing --> PaymentCollection
    PaymentCollection --> InvoiceComplete
    
    Banking --> TransactionImport
    TransactionImport --> Categorization
    Categorization --> Reconciliation
    Reconciliation --> BankingComplete
    
    Documents --> UploadProcess
    UploadProcess --> AIProcessing
    AIProcessing --> DocumentStorage
    DocumentStorage --> DocumentsComplete
    
    TimeTracking --> TimeEntry
    TimeEntry --> ProjectAllocation
    ProjectAllocation --> BillingCalculation
    BillingCalculation --> TimeTrackingComplete
    
    InvoiceComplete --> [*]
    BankingComplete --> [*]
    DocumentsComplete --> [*]
    TimeTrackingComplete --> [*]
```

**Performance Optimization**
- Database connection pooling and query optimization
- Caching strategies for frequently accessed data
- Lazy loading for large datasets
- Image optimization and CDN integration

**Security & Compliance**
- End-to-end encryption for sensitive data
- GDPR compliance with data retention policies
- Audit logging for all financial transactions
- Multi-factor authentication support

The Faworra project represents a sophisticated financial automation platform built with modern web technologies and AI integration. Its modular architecture, comprehensive feature set, and focus on developer experience position it as a robust solution for business financial management needs.

---

**Sources:**
- [package.json](midday/apps/api/package.json)
- [package.json](midday/apps/dashboard/package.json)
- [package.json](midday/apps/worker/package.json)
- [index.ts](midday/apps/api/src/index.ts)
- [layout.tsx](midday/apps/dashboard/src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx)
- [providers.tsx](midday/apps/dashboard/src/app/[locale]/providers.tsx)
- [turbo.json](midday/turbo.json)
- [init.ts](midday/apps/api/src/trpc/init.ts)
- [package.json](midday/packages/db/package.json)
- [_app.ts](midday/apps/api/src/trpc/routers/_app.ts)

</blog>
